title: pelargonium × altum
intro: Pelargonium × altum, also known as mountain rose or Cape geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus and is characterized by its beautiful, fragrant flowers and shrub-like growth. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria, viruses, and fungi, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pelargonium × altum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to digestive issues and skin conditions.
